posts.text: Bankrupt means buy signal in US — Allbirds story is insane. allbirds is a shoe company from the US. started in 2015. made wool sneakers. became the cool shoe for silicon valley tech people. obama wore them. ben affleck wore them. basically if you worked at google and owned a macbook you probably had a pair. 2021 they IPO on nasdaq. massive valuation and then it all fell apart. could not turn profitable. All there stores bleeding money and stock kept falling for years. this year, it was sitting around $2.5… basically dead. look at the chart image 1266×797 94.1 KB March 2026, they sold the actua…
